_meta.description: MAGI Skill Definitions (Tools API exposure for ReAct engine)

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web for information. Use when user asks to find, look up, or search for current information, news, or general knowledge.

query.description: The search query to look up

tools.name: deep_research
tools.description: Conduct in-depth research on a topic by aggregating multiple sources. Use for complex topics requiring comprehensive analysis.

tools.name: fetch_url
tools.description: Fetch and extract content from a specific URL. Use when user provides a URL to read or analyze.

url.description: The URL to fetch content from

tools.name: analyze_image
tools.description: Analyze and describe an image using Melchior's vision capabilities. Use when user asks about image content, OCR, or visual analysis.

image_path.description: Absolute path to the image file

prompt.description: Specific question or instruction for image analysis (default: 'Describe this image in detail')

tools.name: summarize_text
tools.description: Summarize long text content using Balthasar. Use for condensing articles, documents, or lengthy responses.

tools.name: save_memory
tools.description: Save important information to long-term vector memory. Use when user explicitly asks to remember something or when important facts should be stored.

tools.name: recall_memory
tools.description: Recall relevant memories from vector database. Use when user asks 'what did I say about...' or to retrieve previously stored context.

tools.name: query_clients
tools.description: Search law firm clients by keyword. Use when user asks about clients, cases, or client information.

tools.name: add_client
tools.description: Add a new client to the law firm database. Use when user wants to register a new client.

tools.name: list_meetings
tools.description: List upcoming meetings from calendar. Use when user asks about schedule, appointments, or upcoming events.

tools.name: book_meeting
tools.description: Book a new meeting or appointment. Use when user wants to schedule a meeting.

tools.name: legal_automation
tools.description: Execute legacy legal automation scripts (judgment search, court filing, etc.). Use for specialized legal tasks.

skill_name.description: Name of the legal skill to execute (e.g., 'search_judgment', 'court_filing')

args.description: Arguments to pass to the skill

tools.name: send_alert
tools.description: Send emergency alert via Red Phone (LINE + Discord). Use for critical notifications or when admin must be contacted immediately.

tools.name: create_skill
tools.description: Generate a new MAGI skill from description. Use when user wants to create a new automation or tool.

tools.name: melchior_search
tools.description: Perform web search via Melchior with Iron Dome security filtering. Use for safe, filtered search results.

tools.name: acquire_skill
tools.description: Automatically acquire a new skill: searches GitHub, downloads, analyzes with Iron Dome, installs if safe, or generates with MELCHIOR if not found. Use when user needs a new capability.

need.description: Description of the capability needed (e.g., 'process PDF files', 'manage calendar')

auto_generate.description: If true, generate skill with MELCHIOR when not found (default: true)

tools.name: autofix_codebase
tools.description: Autonomously scan and repair Python syntax issues in allowed code roots, then verify compilation. Use when user asks to auto-fix code.

target.description: Target root alias or path (default: code). Allowed aliases: code, magi

max_rounds.description: Maximum repair rounds per failing file (default: 2)

dry_run.description: If true, analyze and propose fixes without writing files

internalize_skill.description: If true, convert learned fixes into an internalized skill

tools.name: teach_casper
tools.description: Teach CASPER a new experience/tip and store it in AutoSkill knowledge base.

keywords.description: Optional keyword list for retrieval precision

tools.name: teach_casper_from_file
tools.description: Teach CASPER from a local file (line-based ingestion) to scale user-provided knowledge.

file_path.description: Absolute path to training file under allowed roots

tools.name: internalize_skill_knowledge
tools.description: Convert CASPER's learned knowledge into a runnable skill with action.py and SKILL.md.

keywords.description: Optional keyword filter for which memories to internalize

tools.name: list_core_change_pending
tools.description: List nightly council pending core changes that require admin approval.

tools.name: approve_core_change
tools.description: Approve a pending core change raised by nightly council.

tools.name: reject_core_change
tools.description: Reject a pending core change raised by nightly council.

tools.name: internalize_codebase_skills
tools.description: Convert CODE folder Python modules into functional skills with CI and auto stable/canary release.

force.description: Rebuild even if file hash unchanged

enable_release.description: Enable CI and release workflow (default: true)

tools.name: import_toolsai_auto_skill
tools.description: Import Toolsai auto-skill knowledge/experience into CASPER AutoSkill memory.

tools.name: tri_sage_translate
tools.description: Translate text via distributed tri-sage pipeline, preferring Melchior Qwen models.

mode.description: Translation mode: auto|full (default: auto). Use full for '不要摘要/完整翻譯'.

tools.name: tri_sage_generate_music
tools.description: Generate music track by Melchior-first pipeline, with Casper fallback audio synthesis.

tools.name: tri_sage_transcribe
tools.description: Transcribe an audio file using tri-sage transcription route.

audio_path.description: Absolute local path to audio file

tools.name: run_statutes_vdb
tools.description: Update case-related statutes into vector DB for CASPER recall

task.description: Task text to pass into action.py

tools.name: run_iron_dome
tools.description: Iron Dome security scan and sync operations

task.description: Task text to pass into action.py

tools.name: run_osc_orchestrator
tools.description: OSC 核心自動化（headless）：待辦解析/入庫/掃描/佇列；不刪檔，可降級。

task.description: Task text to pass into action.py

tools.name: run_translator
tools.description: 完整翻譯（預設不摘要）並可自動輸出 TXT 到 /static/exports，方便用 LINE/DC 回傳。

task.description: Task text to pass into action.py (e.g., translate {..json..})

tools.name: run_crawler_targets
tools.description: 管理每日爬蟲 URL 清單（持久化），並可寫入向量資料庫（run_daily）。

task.description: Task text to pass into action.py (list|add|remove|run_daily)

tools.name: run_gmail_drafts
tools.description: 用 Gmail API 建立草稿（只存草稿、不寄出），供非 LAF 信件回覆流程使用。

task.description: Task text to pass into action.py (create {..json..})

tools.name: run_file_review_orchestrator
tools.description: 閱卷流程技能：信件檢查/可下載判定/下載與歸檔（分段執行，降低 timeout 風險）。

task.description: Task text to pass into action.py

tools.name: run_transcript_downloader
tools.description: 筆錄同步技能：免驗證碼優先登入、下載新筆錄、重命名、歸檔與去重。

task.description: Task text to pass into action.py

tools.name: run_pdf_namer
tools.description: 掃描檔命名與歸檔技能：OCR+視覺判讀收文章日期，寫入案件資料夾並回報路徑。

task.description: Task text to pass into action.py

tools.name: run_magi_autopilot
tools.description: 自動巡檢/夜間任務主流程技能（tick/nightly），整合 LAF/閱卷/筆錄/PDF/待辦/爬蟲。

task.description: Task text to pass into action.py

tools.name: run_judgment_collector
tools.description: 判決與法規爬取技能：透過司法院裁判書系統收集判決，並更新向量資料庫。

task.description: Task text to pass into action.py

tools.name: run_interpreter_empirical_classifier
tools.description: 最高法院通譯裁判實證研究分類：將通譯判決 TXT 批次輸出 CSV/XLSX/Markdown，保留原文摘錄、法院結果、通譯爭點類型與判讀標記。用於通譯判決分類、判決實證研究分類、最高法院通譯表格。

task.description: status|self_test|classify；可加 input_dir=/path/to/TXT output_prefix=/path/to/out

tools.name: run_laf_portal_automation
tools.description: 法扶入口流程技能：登入、查案、只暫存（不送出）回報流程。

task.description: Task text to pass into action.py

tools.name: run_laf_orchestrator
tools.description: 法扶結案報結自動化：整合日曆查詢、次數統計、入口表單填寫、附件上傳。支援 closing/go_live/inquiry/withdrawal/fee/condition 六大流程與 preview_counts 預覽次數。

task.description: closing|go_live|inquiry|withdrawal|fee|condition|preview_counts|self_test

reason.description: 理由/說明文字（零次數欄位需要時填入）

tools.name: run_laf_refine_case
tools.description: 法扶案件精煉技能：清理重複案件、補齊欄位、標準化案件對應。

task.description: Task text to pass into action.py

tools.name: transcript_query
tools.description: Search court hearing transcripts (筆錄) across all cases using natural language. Returns matching passages with full citation: case name, date, page, speaker, and source file. Use when asked about testimony, what someone said in court, or specific statements in transcripts.

query.description: Natural language query about transcript content, e.g. 跟游秀鈴有關的筆錄

task.description: Task instruction for the skill

tools.name: transcript_index
tools.description: Index (vectorize) all case hearing transcripts into the memory database. Run nightly to keep the transcript search up to date. Use when asked to re-index or update transcript database.

force.description: Set to '1' to re-index all files even if unchanged

task.description: Task instruction for the skill

tools.name: pdf_annotate
tools.description: Automatically annotate case volume PDFs (閱卷資料) based on learned annotation patterns from 游秀鈴 case. Highlights important facts, contradictions, dates, names, and key testimony. Runs nightly.

task.description: learn|annotate|test|status (default: annotate)

tools.name: labor_law_calc
tools.description: 台灣勞動基準法計算器：加班費（平日/休息日/例假日/國定假日/停班停課，含各修法版本）、特休假天數、資遣費（舊制/新制/混合制）。支援自然語言輸入、本地 xlsx/pdf 批次計算、Google Sheets URL 代算。OSC 端點：/api/osc/labor-law/calc（支援檔案上傳）。範例：月薪 50000，休息日加班 3 小時 / 到職 2020-03-01，計算特休 / 月薪 45000，到職 2018-01-01，資遣費

task.description: 自然語言計算指令。加班費：月薪 50000，休息日加班 3 小時。特休：到職日 2020-03-01，計算特休。資遣費：月薪 45000，到職 2018-01-01，離職 2026-03-07，資遣費。本地批次：月薪45000 檔案 /path/to/110年度.xlsx /path/to/假日加班紀錄.pdf

tools.name: stock_briefing
tools.description: Daily stock market briefing and price prediction for tracked stocks (台股/美股). Supports quick, technical (RSI/MACD/Bollinger Bands), and deep analysis modes. Use when asked about stock prices, market briefing, or portfolio tracking.

task.description: briefing|list|set|add|remove|performance (default: briefing)

mode.description: quick|technical|deep (default: quick). technical adds RSI/MACD/Bollinger Bands. deep adds all technical plus narrative.

text.description: Stock list for set/add/remove operations, e.g. 台積電, AAPL, MSFT

tools.name: run_mock_test
tools.description: 模擬站全套技能測試：對 eefile_mock + laf_mock 執行 file-review、laf-orchestrator 完整測試並回報結果。支援：模擬測試 / mock test / 閱卷模擬 / 法扶模擬

task.description: all / file_review / laf / notify

tools.name: run_brain_manager
tools.description: Casper 分散式腦架構控制：切換 Local/Distributed 模式、狀態查詢、校準 VRAM、修復模型。

task.description: status|status-text|runtime|mode|switch|repair|calibrate

tools.name: run_db_dual_sync
tools.description: 遠端 Keeper DB 與本地 fallback DB 的雙向同步與備份控制（只 upsert、不刪除）。

task.description: help|self_test|status|sync|backup|list_backups

tools.name: run_judicial_flow_search_archive
tools.description: 流程型技能：自然語句轉司法院布林查詢，上司法院抓判決清單與全文，歸檔（manifest+txt）並回傳摘要。

task.description: help|self_test|boolify {json}|search_archive {json}|布林化|判決搜尋

tools.name: run_judicial_web_search
tools.description: 司法院裁判書網頁爬蟲（Playwright + Chrome）：關鍵字查詢判決清單、抓取單筆全文純文字。

task.description: help|self_test|search {json}|fetch_text {json}|搜尋判決|抓全文

tools.name: run_laf_withdrawal_report
tools.description: 法扶「受扶助人撤回」回報技能（正式站、只暫存不送出）。可用自然語句或 JSON 指定姓名/案號/原因。

task.description: help|self_test|run

tools.name: run_legal_attest
tools.description: 存證信函產生器 — 多步驟對話收集寄收件人資訊與內文，自動排版產出符合郵局格式的存證信函 PDF。

task.description: 對話式互動：init 開始 / 取消 / 依步驟自動推進

tools.name: run_magi_doctor
tools.description: MAGI 全系統自我排查與檢修：掃描 Skill 可載入性、依賴套件完整性、基礎設施健康，並自動修復已知問題。

task.description: diagnose|heal|report

tools.name: run_process_hygiene
tools.description: MAGI 程序衛生檢查與清理：偵測殭屍程序、重複 daemon、孤兒子程序、port 佔用、卡死程序，並可自動修復。

task.description: scan（掃描報告）| clean（掃描+修復）| zombies（只處理殭屍）| dedup（只處理重複程序）

tools.name: run_obsidian
tools.description: Obsidian vault 整合：讀取、搜尋、匯入筆記至 MAGI 向量記憶庫，支援選擇性案件來源擷取。

task.description: status|list_vaults|set_vault|search|read|ingest|ingest_source|ask|help

source.description: ingest_source 來源根目錄（案件|fang|結案|舊案）

tools.name: run_osc_scan_folder
tools.description: OSC 資料夾掃描：解析單一資料夾內文件待辦，寫 DB 或降級佇列。不刪檔、可 headless 呼叫。

task.description: help|self_test|run {json}|掃描資料夾待辦 {json}

tools.name: run_worldmonitor_intel
tools.description: 透過 worldmonitor 全球情報儀表板收集、分析、記憶國際情勢。

task.description: collect|recall|status

tools.name: run_auto_magi_skill
tools.description: Run generated fallback skill for: @MAGI 搜尋 你能寫一個查詢天氣預報的skill嗎

task.description: Task text to pass into action.py

tools.name: run_judicial_tools
tools.description: 司法院辦案小工具集：規費試算、上訴期間、折舊、霍夫曼、利息違約金、刑度加重減輕、土地分割合併、不當得利、繼承系統表等 17 項離線計算工具

task.description: 指令與參數，如: judicial_fee {"category":"民事","amount":1000000}、depreciation {"method":"平均法","cost":500000,"useful_years":5,"used_years":3}、appeal_period、elapsed_time、hoffman、interest、sentence、land_division、land_merge、unjust_enrichment、inheritance、co_owner_share 等

tools.name: run_pdf_bookmarker
tools.description: 法律文件 PDF 自動書籤技能：掃描文字層（或 OCR 掃描檔），依日期/文件類型/姓名自動標記章節書籤，輸出帶目錄的 PDF。

task.description: Task: scan_file --path <path> [--case-name <name>] [--output <out>]

tools.name: run_contract_review
tools.description: 合約審閱工具 — 審查任意合約文件並找出不利條款與風險點。使用時機：當使用者說「幫我看這份合約」「審閱 NDA」「合約有沒有問題」「這份保密協議可以簽嗎」「幫我查這個廠商合約」「法律文件摘要」等相關指令時，務必使用本技能。

task.description: 子任務：review=合約審閱, nda=NDA分流, summarize=法律摘要, vendor_check=供應商查核

tools.name: run_court_hearing_reminder
tools.description: 查詢開庭排程、發送開庭提醒、生成庭前準備摘要，也支援補正期限與繳費期限提醒。

task.description: 子任務：scan=掃描排程, remind=發送提醒, prep=庭前準備摘要, list=列出排程

text.description: 自然語句（通訊軟體路由用）

tools.name: run_brief_gen
tools.description: 書狀輔助產生 — 依案件類型產生書狀草稿架構

task.description: Task payload (JSON or plain text)

tools.name: run_insight_refine
tools.description: INSIGHT 文字精煉（用 CASPER 分散式推理清理 OCR/判決內容成可用見解），可 headless 呼叫與自測。

task.description: Task payload (JSON or plain text)

tools.name: run_labor_law_calculator
tools.description: 勞基法計算器 — 純 Python 計算加班費、特休假、資遣費，支援自然語言輸入、Excel/PDF 出勤紀錄解析與 Google Sheets 代算。

task.description: Task payload (JSON or plain text)

tools.name: run_market_briefing
tools.description: market-briefing skill

task.description: Task payload (JSON or plain text)

tools.name: run_pdf_annotator
tools.description: 依據參考案件 PDF 書籤樣式，使用視覺模組對案件卷宗 PDF 自動建立導覽書籤（目錄）。支援從現有書籤學習命名慣例，或以視覺模型推斷。

task.description: Task payload (JSON or plain text)

tools.name: run_transcript_indexer
tools.description: 筆錄向量化索引器 — 掃描案件資料夾中的筆錄 PDF，依發言人分段後寫入 KEEPER 向量記憶庫，支援自然語句查詢並附出處。

task.description: Task payload (JSON or plain text)

tools.name: run_trial_prep
tools.description: 開庭準備自動化 — 依開庭日期自動彙整案件資料、產生開庭備忘

task.description: Task payload (JSON or plain text)

tools.name: run_evidence_admissibility
tools.description: 卷證索引證據能力分類工具 — 將法院卷證索引文字檔解析後，依刑事訴訟法傳聞法則自動分類每筆證據的證據能力意見，產出格式化 Excel 表格。適用於辯護律師準備證據能力意見表。

task.description: Task: help / rules / classify {JSON payload}

tools.name: run_pdf_tool
tools.description: PDF 瑞士刀：合併(merge)、分割(split)、擷取文字(extract)、OCR辨識(ocr)、加密(encrypt)、解密(decrypt)、旋轉(rotate)、浮水印(watermark)、PDF資訊(info)、擷取圖片(images)、表單填寫(form)。

task.description: Task: merge/split/extract/ocr/encrypt/decrypt/rotate/watermark/info/images/form/help + arguments

tools.name: run_casper_autofix_knowledge
tools.description: Auto-learned code repair patterns from CASPER.

task.description: Task text to pass into action.py

tools.name: screenshot_sorter
tools.description: 對話截圖排序與重新命名。將資料夾中的通訊軟體對話截圖（LINE、iMessage、Messenger 等）按照時間順序排序並重新命名。支援浮水印標註。

watermark.description: 是否加浮水印編號（預設 false）
